title: IIM Calcutta Capital India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: IIM Calcutta Capital India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
IIM Calcutta Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Calcutta Capital India:
IIM Calcutta Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Calcutta Capital India!
